text:
どう、わかった？
バレットボウは、精神集中して
狙い撃つ、心の武器なんだよねー。

うまく当たらないとすれば
それは、心に迷いがあるからだ！

……なーんてね。
ま、経験を積んで慣れるっきゃないよ。

わたしもまだまだ未熟でさ
間違えて、味方狙いそうに
なっちゃうぐらいだけど……

一緒に上手くなっていければ
それはそれで嬉しいかな。
じゃあ、ま

Getting the hang of it, yet? When working
with bows, you need to focus and make
your mind and body one before you
even take aim.

If you find yourself missing too many shots,
just remember, it's all an internal struggle.
You must first clear your mind!

...Nah, I'm just kidding.
What you really need to do is just keep at it
until you get the hang of things.

I'm not so great myself, yet. Sometimes I even
have to stop myself when I realize I'm lining
up a shot at someone on my team...

But it'd be nice if we both got a little better
at handling them, right? See you around, then.
